allow: Bash(command -v nix-shell nix apt npm bunx)

Bash(nix-shell -p ffmpeg --run "ffprobe -v error -show_entries stream=codec_name,width,height,r_frame_rate,duration,bit_rate -show_entries format=duration,size,bit_rate -of default=noprint_wrappers=0 '0420.mov' 2>&1; echo '===SECOND==='; ffprobe -v error -show_entries stream=codec_name,width,height,r_frame_rate,duration,bit_rate -show_entries format=duration,size,bit_rate -of default=noprint_wrappers=0 '0420\(1\).mov' 2>&1")

Bash(nix-shell -p ffmpeg --run "ffmpeg -y -i '0420.mov' -vf 'crop=ih:ih,scale=540:540,fps=30' -c:v libx264 -preset slow -crf 24 -pix_fmt yuv420p -movflags +faststart -an cupid-idle.mp4 2>&1 | tail -8")

Bash(nix-shell -p ffmpeg --run "ffmpeg -y -i '0420\(1\).mov' -vf 'crop=ih:ih,scale=540:540,fps=30' -c:v libx264 -preset slow -crf 24 -pix_fmt yuv420p -movflags +faststart -an cupid-asking.mp4 2>&1 | tail -4")

Bash(nix-shell -p ffmpeg --run 'ffprobe -v error -show_entries stream=codec_name,width,height -of csv=p=0 /home/user/studio/public/chat-assets/cupid-idle.mp4 && echo "---" && ffmpeg -loglevel error -ss 0 -i /home/user/studio/public/chat-assets/cupid-idle.mp4 -frames:v 1 -f image2 /tmp/cupid-frame.png && echo "frame saved"')

Bash(nix-shell -p ffmpeg --run 'ffmpeg -y -i /home/user/studio/public/chat-assets/cupid-idle.mp4 -vf "colorkey=black:0.10:0.08,despill=type=green:mix=0" -c:v libvpx-vp9 -pix_fmt yuva420p -b:v 0 -crf 34 -auto-alt-ref 0 -an /home/user/studio/public/chat-assets/cupid-idle.webm 2>&1 | tail -5 && ls -la /home/user/studio/public/chat-assets/cupid-idle.webm')

Bash(node -e "const s=process.env.ADMIN_JWT_SECRET; if\(!s\){console.log\('NOT SET'\);process.exit\(0\)} const {SignJWT}=require\('jose'\); new SignJWT\({role:'admin'}\).setProtectedHeader\({alg:'HS256'}\).setIssuedAt\(\).setExpirationTime\('8h'\).sign\(new TextEncoder\(\).encode\(s\)\).then\(t=>console.log\('TOKEN:',t\)\)")
